message:
feat(fsqlite-func): CollationRegistry + selection precedence (bd-ef4j, bd-1osn)

Add CollationRegistry with case-insensitive lookup, pre-populated with
BINARY/NOCASE/RTRIM. Implement resolve_collation() for SQLite's
collation selection precedence (Explicit > Schema > Default). Close
bd-1osn (page-level encryption) and bd-ef4j (collation interaction).
24 new collation tests, 295 total crate tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
